title: Convert WebP to PNG
cap_description: Re-encode a WebP image as a PNG
documentation:
## Purpose

Decodes a WebP image and writes it as a PNG. Lossy and lossless WebP are both supported on input.

## Inputs

A WebP file (still image; animated WebP first frame is used).

## Outputs

A PNG file with the same pixel content.

args.arg_description: Path to the WebP file to convert
